name: suction-cups
short_effect: Prevents being forced out of battle by other Pokémon's moves.
effect_text: This Pokémon cannot be forced out of battle by moves such as whirlwind.  dragon tail and circle throw still inflict damage against this Pokémon.  Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the success rate while fishing is increased.
flavor_text: The Pokémon uses suction cups to stay in one spot. This protects it from moves and items that would force it to switch out.
